attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.PLAN_SEQ_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.DELIVERY_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.RELEASE_WEIGHT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.FREIGHT_CHARGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ASSIGNMENT_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I,
 (
 select PLAN_SEQ_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I
 minus
 select PLAN_SEQ_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_IC
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PLAN_SEQ_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.PLAN_SEQ_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_I.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_IFACE)
